pilots.name: A-CFG Reproduction on Dream-7B
pilots.purpose: Validate that CFG mechanism works on Dream-7B (proven on LLaDA-8B). Decision Gate 1.
pilots.fail_action: Switch all CFG experiments to LLaDA-8B

pilots.name: BSD Belief Vector Feasibility
pilots.purpose: Verify belief vectors don't cause OOD collapse in Dream-7B's embedding space.
pilots.pass_criteria: Outputs well-formed (rep-3 < 2x vanilla) AND belief entropy shows decreasing trend
pilots.fail_action: Activate fallback_beta mixing (0.9→0.1 linear decay) and re-test

pilots.name: RACFG Stability-Guided Re-masking
pilots.purpose: Verify JSD stability signals are meaningful and guidance improves accuracy.
pilots.pass_criteria: Accuracy >= vanilla AND stability scores show meaningful variance (std > 0.1)
pilots.fail_action: Fall back to A-CFG confidence signal with temporal scheduling only

pilots.name: DMI Baseline Reproduction
pilots.purpose: Confirm DMI 9.3% Countdown-500 baseline is reproducible with current code.

parallel_schedule.description: All 4 pilots run in parallel on GPUs 0-3 (Phase 1, ~4 GPU·hours total)

criteria: pilot_acfg_repro passes → proceed with RACFG on Dream-7B
pilot_acfg_repro fails → switch to LLaDA-8B for all CFG tasks
pilot_bsd passes → proceed with BSD ablations
pilot_bsd fails → activate fallback_beta and re-test
pilot_racfg passes → proceed with RACFG ablations
pilot_racfg fails → use A-CFG signal + temporal scheduling only
pilot_dmi_repro passes → DMI confirmed as baseline
